query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'colaboradores' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%comiss%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%experiencia%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Experiencia%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Comiss%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'colaboradores' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%comiss%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%experiencia%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Experiencia%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Comiss%');
